title: Dabie mountain topography and cross-regional transport regulating nitrate heterogeneity during a severe haze episode in Jiangxi
abstract:
•WRF-CMAQ and IPR reveal driving mechanisms of a severe winter nitrate haze episode. •Nitrate accumulated aloft before mixing downward via subsidence and turbulence. •Dabie Mountains exert a dual barrier and convergence effect on regional transport. •Wind shear-induced turbulence erodes the nocturnal inversion during the cold surge. •Reducing boundary inflow of precursors significantly mitigates receptor nitrate. 
 Particulate nitrate (NO3−) increasingly dominates winter PM2.5 pollution episodes in China, yet the three-dimensional transport pathways linking regional inflow to surface receptors remain poorly quantified over terrain-modulated inland provinces. Here we integrate surface observations with WRF–CMAQ simulations to investigate a severe winter NO3−-dominated episode in Jiangxi Province. The episode exhibits a clear north-to-south propagation under post-frontal northerlies. In northern Jiangxi (Jiujiang), NO3− first accumulated aloft (400–1000 m) due to strong horizontal advection (peak 54 μg m−3 h−1), then rapidly enhanced at the surface as boundary-layer turbulence increased (PBLH up to 405 m), producing large positive vertical-mixing contributions (67.5 μg m−3 h−1) together with synoptic subsidence (vertical advection up to 92.9 μg m−3 h−1). The transport shows a gradual shift to horizontal transport dominance (surface NO3− up to 89.6 μg m−3) to the downwind central and southern cities. Sensitivity tests reveal strong modulation by terrain and upwind inflow. Reducing the terrain height of the Dabie Mountains north of Jiujiang to a representative plain elevation increases mean NO3− over central–southern Jiangxi by 4.5 μg m−3, whereas reducing the lateral boundary inflow of precursors to one-third of the original level decreases multi-city mean NO3− by 37.5% and extremes by up to 54.8%. These results highlight that coordinated upwind precursor controls can deliver amplified benefits for receptor cities along major transport corridors.

authors: Xinyu Liu;Rongjie Zhang;Yangjie Zhang;Hong-Bin Xie
title: Nitric acid-enhanced iodine oxoacids nucleation
abstract:
•NA donates a proton to HIO2and forms halogen/hydrogen bonds with iodine oxoacids. •1 ppb NA enhances IA-HIO2nucleation rate by more than 10 times at [IA] = 108cm−3. •NA plays both a catalytic and participating role in NA-IA-HIO2ternary system. 
 Iodine oxoacids (IA-HIO2) have been recognized as important drivers of marine new particle formation (NPF). However, IA-HIO2 nucleation mechanism cannot fully account for observed marine NPF rates. Although nitric acid (NA) is a ubiquitous and efficient nucleation enhancer, its role in IA-HIO2 nucleation remains unclear. Hence, we investigated the formation mechanisms and kinetics of (NA)x(IA)y(HIO2)z (x + y = 0–3, z = 1–3) clusters with quantum chemical calculations and Atmospheric Cluster Dynamics Code (ACDC). The structural analysis indicates that NA, serving as an acidic component, can stabilize NA-IA-HIO2 clusters by donating a proton to HIO2, and forming hydrogen bonds/halogen bonds. NA acts as both a catalyst and a participant in the cluster growth pathway of ternary NA-IA-HIO2 nucleation system. The enhancing effect of NA is still efficient even at high concentrations of IA (∼108 cm−3), where 1 ppb of NA can enhance the cluster formation rate of IA-HIO2 system by more than 10-fold. The proposed NA-IA-HIO2 mechanism may help us to understand the frequent NPF in polluted coastal areas plausibly.

explanation: 该论文研究了闪旱的驱动机制，涉及温度、蒸散和降水等大气环境因素，使用了可解释人工智能和再分析产品，与大气环境遥感技术（如卫星观测和大气成分分析）密切相关。
topic_words: ['artificial intelligence', 'reanalysis products', 'Earth system models', 'anthropogenic warming', 'vegetation greening']
authors: Jun Li;Yao Zhang;Emanuele Bevacqua;Shijie Jiang;Xing Yuan;Sha Zhou;Jinghao Qiu;ZhaoLi Wang;Jakob Zscheischler;Kaicun Wang;Shilong Piao
title: Warming and vegetation greening drive recent surge in flash droughts
abstract: Flash droughts have become more frequent, yet their underlying mechanisms of such changes remain unclear. Using an explainable artificial intelligence–based clustering framework with reanalysis products and Earth system models, we show that the major driving mechanisms of global flash droughts have shifted from precipitation dominance to a compound effect of temperature, transpiration, and precipitation. This transition drives a surge in flash droughts over the past decade, with more rapidly developing, severe, and enduring soil droughts. Anthropogenic warming and vegetation greening are the main drivers of the observed surge. The transition, which has emerged beyond natural climate variability since 2017 and is mainly detected in Eurasia, Amazon, and Africa, exposes ~650 million people under threat and reduces gross primary productivity by 0.15 ± 0.1 petagrams of carbon per year. Our results demonstrate that biosphere and atmosphere responses to anthropogenic forcing have altered flash drought drivers, emphasizing the urgent need for targeted mitigation strategies.

explanation: 该论文研究了塑料燃烧产生的亚微米颗粒（PDSPs），这些颗粒在大气环境中具有独特的物理和化学性质，对空气质量和大气化学过程有重要影响。因此，它与大气环境遥感技术密切相关，特别是空气质量和大气成分分析领域。
topic_words: ['塑料燃烧颗粒', '亚微米颗粒', '大气环境监测', '空气污染']
authors: Lin Kong;Hongru Shen;Xing Wang;Michael A. R. Tawadrous;Emily R. Halpern;Qiaorong Xie;Alexander Laskin;Kin Fai Ho;Bonnie M. Hamilton;Alex K. Y. Lee;Man Nin Chan;Arthur W. H. Chan
title: Distinct properties of plastic-derived submicrometer particles from smoldering burning
abstract: Widespread plastic use and mismanaged disposal release substantial amounts of particles into the atmosphere during waste burning. We define these thermally generated particles as plastic-derived submicrometer particles (PDSPs), a poorly characterized class of contaminants. We provide direct evidence that PDSPs are distinct from conventional micro- and nanoplastic particles that are formed mainly by mechanical processes. We show that PDSPs contain mixtures of altered polymeric substances and oxygenated compounds produced by extensive thermal decomposition and chemical transformations during smoldering. Volatility distributions suggest that PDSPs exist in semisolid phase states with lower viscosities than their original polymers. Upon exposure to hydroxyl radicals, the principal oxidant in the atmosphere, PDSPs exhibit higher reactivity than the original polymer particles, forming highly oxidized aerosol species at reaction rates comparable to typical atmospheric organic aerosols. These findings demonstrate that plastic smoldering introduces a previously unrecognized class of atmospherically active particles, with implications for their contribution to global plastic budgets, persistence in the atmosphere, and potential effects on human health and climate-relevant processes.

explanation: 该论文研究全球天气系统中极端降水概率分布，涉及降水动态、强度分布和影响因素，与大气环境遥感技术中的空气质量监测、卫星观测和大气成分分析高度相关。
authors: Suqin Q. Duan;Wei-Ming Tsai;Fiaz Ahmed;J. David Neelin
title: Extreme-range precipitation probability across global weather systems
abstract: Precipitating weather systems are major contributors to hazardous extreme rain, yet weather and climate models struggle to capture their dynamics and relative impacts. Using high-resolution observations, we examine precipitation probability distributions at hourly timescale linked to major system types across the globe. We show that the high-intensity tails of these distributions share a typical shape, which can be characterized by an intensity scale. Dynamic processes largely govern this universal shape, while thermodynamic factors modulate its magnitude. We find that intensity scales of major contributing systems largely match those of total precipitation due to shared thermodynamic environments, dominance of intense systems, and modest variations in dynamic scales. This universality of various system types’ precipitation probability tail supports risk assessment without overly depending on weather-type identification for most regions. We identify exceptions where intense tropical low-pressure systems or mesoscale convective system co-occurrences disproportionately affect extremes, yielding gray-swan-prone distributions.

explanation: 该论文研究了飓风中的空气-海面拖曳系数及其与海况的依赖关系，使用了表面无人机进行测量，这与大气环境遥感技术中的空气质量和海洋观测密切相关。
authors: Gregory R. Foltz;Dongxiao Zhang;Lev B. Looney;Andrew M. Chiodi;Jun A. Zhang;Chidong Zhang;Edoardo Mazza;Nan-Hsun Chi;Edward D. Cokelet
title: Hurricane air-sea drag saturation and sea-state dependence revealed by surface drones
abstract: The ocean supplies energy for tropical cyclones (TCs) and slows their winds through surface friction, which exerts a force on the ocean termed wind stress. The drag coefficient (Cd) is the key parameter that converts wind speed to wind stress and is currently estimated in forecast models from incomplete data collected in low-to-moderate ocean winds. Here, we use measurements from 11 Atlantic hurricanes to quantifyCdin winds up to 44 meters per second and surface waves up to 14 meters. It is found thatCdlevels off, as wind speed surpasses 30 meters per second but does not decrease appreciably as suggested by previous indirect methods. Interaction of the wind and wave fields causesCdto be 20 ± 2% higher on the motion-left side of a storm, where wind and waves are misaligned, than on the right. These results quantify directly a fundamental TC air-sea interaction parameter and demonstrate the importance of distinct TC quadrant-specific wind-wave interactions.

explanation: 该论文涉及欧亚副热带西风急流（ESWJ）的变化及其对亚洲干旱地区气候的影响，包括气溶胶排放、温室气体浓度和环流动力学等因素，这与大气环境遥感技术中的空气质量监测和大气成分分析密切相关。
topic_words: ['westerly jet', 'aerosol emissions', 'greenhouse gas', 'dynamic moisture advection', 'Asian drylands']
authors: Jie Jiang and Tianjun Zhou
title: A strengthened and southward-shifted westerly jet mitigates warming-induced drying across Asian drylands
abstract: The Eurasian Subtropical Westerly Jet (ESWJ), a key component of the Eurasia circulation system, has weakened in summer since 1979 due to uneven aerosol emissions. Its future evolution under human activities, including clean air policies, remains uncertain yet critical for climate adaptation in mid-latitude Asian drylands. Using multiscenario projections, we show that the ESWJ is projected to reverse its historical weakening trend and turn to strengthen during 2025–2100. This intensification arises from both increasing greenhouse gas (GHG) concentrations and declining anthropogenic aerosols. Aerosol reduction primarily triggers the transition from weakening to strengthening, already emerging around 2010, while GHG forcing additionally induces a southward displacement. These circulation changes enhance dynamic moisture advection into Central Asia, partially offsetting the “dry-get-drier” paradigm and resulting in limited changes in regional water availability. While recent studies have emphasized the warming effects of aerosol reduction, our findings highlight the critical role of circulation dynamics in shaping regional hydroclimatic security.

explanation: 该论文研究的是一种通过电化学方法捕捉二氧化碳的技术，涉及电极和膜分离技术，虽然不直接涉及大气环境遥感技术，但其研究内容与大气环境中的污染物（如CO2）的监测和处理相关，因此可以认为与大气环境遥感技术有间接关联。
authors: Kaige Sun;Mike Tebyetekerwa;Hongxia Zhang;Timothy T. Duignan;Rizal Evans;Lei Ge;Yi Sun;Yuhui Ge;Zhuyuan Wang;Chao Xing;Jindi Yang;Xiangkang Zeng;Darren Martin;Xiwang Zhang
title: Membrane-separated electrodes enable high-rate low-energy electrochemical carbon capture
abstract: Electrochemical carbon dioxide (CO2) capture using supercapacitive systems is a promising green technology but remains limited by low uptake rates and high energy requirement. Here, we present a membrane-integrated supercapacitor system that addresses these challenges by decoupling electrode environments with a cation exchange membrane. This configuration sustains high hydroxide concentration at the gas-facing negative electrode, generated through dynamic water dissociation within the electric double layer. The resulting localized alkaline interface enhances CO2capture by driving its conversion into (bi)carbonate species via a pH-swing mechanism. The system achieves a CO2uptake of up to 893 mmol/kg with a fast rate of 1281 mmol/kg/hour at −1.4 V under 20% CO2. Energy consumption as low as 32 kJ/mol is obtained at −0.8 V under 20% CO2together with a long lifetime over 200 hours at −1.0 V, 10% CO2. These findings establish a robust platform for electrochemical CO2capture and underscore the importance of localized chemical environments in supercapacitive swing adsorption.

explanation: 该论文研究了一种集成化的无线深度紫外传感系统，用于智能早期火灾检测。虽然主要关注点在于火灾检测，但其使用的深度紫外（DUV）传感技术可以应用于大气环境遥感，例如通过紫外光谱分析大气成分或监测特定气体。因此，该研究在技术层面与大气环境遥感有一定相关性。
authors: Taehyun Park;Junhwa Oh;Junhyung Cho;Seungme Kang;Nicola Gasparini;Wooseok Song;Jaehyun Hur;Garam Bae;Seyong Oh;Hocheon Yoo
title: An integrated wireless deep-UV sensing system for intelligent early fire detection
abstract: Uncontrolled fires, from wildlands to industrial facilities, have become a pressing global threat, causing widespread ecological damage, loss of life, and economic disruption. The fundamental challenge is the lack of rapid and reliable detection at the ignition stage. Once flames spread, suppression becomes increasingly difficult and damage escalates. Conventional methods such as smoke detectors and thermal imaging fall short for wildfire and large-scale fire scenarios. Effective systems require accurate detection without false activation, stable performance under varied and harsh environments, and low power or zero-bias photodetection for continuous use in remote locations. Here, we report a wireless and flexible deep-ultraviolet (DUV) sensing platform that addresses these requirements in a single integrated unit. The platform combines a zinc tin oxide nanocomposite photodetector, flexible circuit integration, portable power, and Bluetooth communication. The sensor shows a selective solar-blind DUV response, stable operation under mechanical stress and extended cycling (92.5% retention after 100 bending cycles and 96.7% after 180 days), and energy-efficient performance compatible with autonomous deployment. Data-driven analysis of response curves allows for machine learning models that classify flame types and estimate distance, extending the system beyond binary fire detection by providing additional information on flame type and relative distance. This integrated approach provides a practical route to reliable fire monitoring, relevant to early-stage fire monitoring concepts for wildfire and industrial safety applications.
